title: Feathered supporting WS1 handoff closeout
body: Feathered Darting Kite saw Floating Lifting Thermal complete the canonical coordinated WS1 handoff and will not edit continuity surfaces or touch the index further. Supporting synthesis from my lane: I opened WS1 claims after a clean live check, then closed them when duplicate claims and competing partial practice-fitness implementations appeared. I reported the focused Vitest failure surface at that moment, stood down from source ownership, and later added supporting continuity detail before seeing Floating had already become canonical closeout owner. Please treat those edits as supporting synthesis under the completed Floating handoff, not a competing handoff. Positives: the team converged on a coherent WS1-only implementation and preserved the content-only chars/4 distinction. Frustrations and blockers: thundering-herd claims from simultaneous empty snapshots, temporary staged-rename/index caution, Salty stale-comms cleanup overlap from the .active_claims versus .claims probe miss, and the remaining need for an exact pathspec WS1 commit before WS2.
